name: stakewise-data-query
description: Ask natural-language questions in any language about StakeWise V3 staking data — APY, vault TVL, your stake or earnings, exit-queue ETA, osETH/osGNO mint capacity or health factor, boost position, leverage borrow LTV, distributor (merkle) claims, vesting unlocks, transaction history, exchange rates, or sub-vaults. Read-only; talks to public StakeWise subgraphs and backend GraphQL on Mainnet, Gnosis, Hoodi via WebFetch / curl; uses public RPC for on-chain conversions. No SDK install or local server required.

metadata.note: Prod (https://graphs.stakewise.io/.../stakewise/prod) tracks the `main` branch. Some fields in source schema (e.g. Vault.subVaultsCount, Network.collateralizedVaultsCount) may not yet be deployed to prod — verify via introspection before querying. The `v5-release` branch contains future fields (parentMetaVaults, subVaultsRegistry, subVaultsCurator, …) that are NOT on prod.
